View official rules

Questions we get a lot

How do I enter?

Create a Base44 account, build your app, publish it, then share a link to your app on X, Instagram, LinkedIn, or Facebook. Tag Base44 on social and include #MyBigGameApp. Make sure your post is public.

What can I win?

Boldest Idea: $15,000 for the most original concept

Best Built App: $15,000 for the most polished execution

Most Buzzworthy App: $15,000 for the app that got the most attention

Wild Card: $5,000 for the judges' pick

When does it run?

Contest opens January 29, 2026 at 12:00 AM PT and closes February 10, 2026 at 11:59 PM PT. Winners are announced Feb 12.

Who can enter?

Anyone 18+ who doesn't live in Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Syria, Russia, Crimea, Donetsk, or Luhansk.

What should I build?

Anything that makes game day better. Watch-party tools, score predictors, snack rankers, halftime bingo—whatever. Be creative. Have fun. Just make sure it’s related to the Big Game in some way.

What can't I include in my app?

No sexually explicit, violent, defamatory, illegal content, or any other content that violates the Official Rules

What are you looking for in each category?

Boldest Idea: Originality, creative problem-solving, uniqueness. Does it make us think "why didn't anyone think of this before?"

Best Built: Polish, usability, functionality. Does it work smoothly and look finished?

Most Buzzworthy: User engagement, social media traction, community interest. Did people actually use it and talk about it?

Wild Card: Whatever catches the judges' attention. No fixed criteria—just something memorable.

Still have questions?

Read the full Official Rules or email [support@base44.com].
